message:
fix: sort env var keys for deterministic warning order (#3364) (#3379)

Map iteration in Go is non-deterministic, so warnDefaultEnvVars() produced
warnings in random order across runs. Sort the keys before iterating to
make log output stable and CI-parseable.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
